sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: O REILLY AUTOMOTIVE INC의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 1분기 매출은 4억 2,400만 달러 증가하여 45억 6,000만 달러를 기록했으며, 전년 동기 41억 4,000만 달러 대비 10% 성장했다.
동일매장 매출은 8.1% 증가했으며, 프로페셔널 채널은 두 자릿수 성장, DIY 채널은 중간 한 자릿수 성장을 달성했다.
영업이익은 14% 증가하여 8억 4,200만 달러(매출 대비 18.5%)를 기록했고, 순이익은 12% 증가하여 6억 400만 달러를 달성했다.

riskChanges.text: 판관비가 15억 1,000만 달러로 9% 증가했으나, 매출 비중은 33.0%로 전년 33.4% 대비 소폭 개선되어 비용 관리 효율이 유지되고 있다.

businessChanges.text: 프로페셔널 및 DIY 양대 채널 모두 성장하며 시장 점유율 확대 기조를 유지했고, 경영진은 2026년에도 안정적인 수요 환경을 기대하고 있다.
1분기에 자사주 9억 2,300만 달러 규모를 매입했으며, 평균 매입단가는 주당 92.45달러였다.

financialHighlights.text: 매출총이익은 매출 대비 51.3%에서 소폭 하락한 수준을 유지했고, 매출 규모는 전년 23억 5,000만 달러를 크게 상회했다.
순이익은 6억 400만 달러(매출 대비 13.2%)로 전년 5억 3,800만 달러 대비 6,600만 달러, 12% 증가했다.
희석 EPS는 전년 동기 대비 16% 증가했다.
연초 이후 영업활동으로 인한 순현금 창출은 10억 달러를 기록했다.

watchItems.text: 자사주 매입을 위한 9억 2,300만 달러 현금 유출이 지속되고 있어, 자본배분 정책과 레버리지 추이를 지속 모니터링할 필요가 있다.
동일매장 매출이 전년 3.6%에서 8.1%로 가속화됐으나, 이 성장세의 지속 가능성이 2026년 하반기 핵심 관전 포인트다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 orly-20260429xex99d1.htm EX-99.1 Exhibit 99.1 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE ​ O’REILLY AUTOMOTIVE, INC. REPORTS FIRST QUARTER 2026 RESULTS ​ ● First quarter comparable store sales growth of 8.1% ● 16% increase in first quarter diluted earnings per share to $0.72 ● $1 billion net cash provided by operating activities year-to-date ​ Springfield, MO, April 29, 2026 – O’Reilly Automotive, Inc. (the “Company” or “O’Reilly”) ( Nasdaq: ORLY), a leading retailer in the automotive aftermarket industry, today announced record revenue and earnings for its first quarter ended March 31, 2026. ​ 1 st Quarter Financial Results Brad Beckham, O’Reilly’s CEO, commented, “We are pleased to report a strong start to 2026, highlighted by an 8.1% increase in comparable store sales and a 16% increase in our first quarter diluted earnings per share. Team O’Reilly delivered comparable store sales results  Normalized numeric aliases: $1 billion = 10억 달러; $0.72 = 0.72달러; $1 = 1달러.

our expectations in both professional and DIY, with double-digit growth in our professional business and mid-single digit growth in DIY. Our ability to drive productivity in our business and translate robust sales growth into a 14% increase in operating profit is the direct result of our Team’s focus on prudent expense management. I would like to thank all of our Team Members for their incredible hard work in the first quarter and their relentless focus on providing unsurpassed service to our customers each and every day. We look forward to the opportunities we have to grow our market share in 2026 and are encouraged by the stable demand backdrop in our industry.” ​ Sales for the first quarter of 2026 increased $424 million, or 10%, to $4.56 billion from $4.14 billion for the  Normalized numeric aliases: $424 million = 4억 2,400만 달러; $4.56 billion = 45억 6,000만 달러; $4.14 billion = 41억 4,000만 달러; $2.35 billion = 23억 5,000만 달러; $424 = 424달러; $4.56 = 4.56달러; $4.14 = 4.14달러; $2.35 = 2.35달러.

of sales) from $2.12 billion (or 51.3% of sales) for the same period one year ago. Selling, general and administrative expenses for the first quarter of 2026 increased 9% to $1.51 billion (or 33.0% of sales) from $1.38 billion (or 33.4% of sales) for the same period one year ago. Operating income for the first quarter of 2026 increased 14% to $842 million (or 18.5% of sales) from $741 million (or 17.9% of sales) for the same period one year ago. ​ Net income for the first quarter of 2026 increased $66 million, or 12%, to $604 million (or 13.2% of sales) from $538 million (or 13.0% of sales) for the same period one  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.12 billion = 21억 2,000만 달러; $1.51 billion = 15억 1,000만 달러; $1.38 billion = 13억 8,000만 달러; $842 million = 8억 4,200만 달러; $741 million = 7억 4,100만 달러; $66 million = 6,600만 달러; $604 million = 6억 400만 달러; $538 million = 5억 3,800만 달러; 864 million = 8억 6,400만 달러; $741 = 741달러; $0.62 = 0.62달러; $66 = 66달러; $604 = 604달러; $538 = 538달러; $0.72 = 0.72달러.

on the change in sales for U.S. stores open at least one year and exclude sales of specialty machinery, sales to independent parts stores, and sales to Team Members. Online sales for ship-to-home orders and pick-up-in-store orders for U.S. stores open at least one year are included in the comparable store sales calculation. Comparable store sales increased 8.1% for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026, on top of 3.6% for the same period one year ago. ​ Share Repurchase Program During the first quarter ended March 31, 2026, the Company repurchased 10.0 million shares of its common stock, at an average price per share of $92.45, for a total investment of $923 million. Excise tax on shares repurchased, assessed at one ​ percent of the fair market value of shares repurchased, was $9.2 million for the three months ended March 31, 2026.  Normalized numeric aliases: 10.0 million = 1,000만 달러; $923 million = 9억 2,300만 달러; $9.2 million = 920만 달러; $92.45 = 92.45달러; $923 = 923달러; $9.2 = 9.2달러.
